name: accessguard-exchange
description: A zero-trust accessibility bounty marketplace: agents audit, compete to remediate, and settle on Solana only for fixes a deterministic verifier accepts.
author: AccessGuard Exchange

settlement.note: Payout is gated on an objective WCAG re-audit; see chain/solana_client.py

skills.summary: Fetch a live URL's HTML for auditing.
Deterministic WCAG 2.2 audit — the trustless referee that prices bounties.
Propose patches for violations; competing suppliers specialise by skill.
Objectively verify a patch (claimed fix gone + no regressions).
Run the full audit -> compete -> verify -> settle loop.

coordination.payout_rule: release bounty iff verify() accepts a candidate patch
